how_to_body: Go to your channel settings Add {bot_username} as an Administrator Give it at least Add Members permission Tap Bot is Admin below
title:
{e_force_join} Force Join Require subscribers to join your Telegram channel(s) before they can use the bot.
Setup: 1. Add your bot as an admin on the channel 2. Tap Add Channel and paste the channel username or link 3. The bot verifies membership every time a subscriber sends /start Multi-channel verification (requiring more than one channel) requires Advanced plan.
upgrade_basic_required:
Force Join Requiring subscribers to join a channel requires Basic plan.
Basic unlocks 1 required channel, reply keyboards, and reaction analytics from 150 Stars/month.
upgrade_multi_required:
Multi-Channel Force Join Requiring multiple channels requires Advanced plan.
Advanced unlocks up to 5 required channels, conditional buttons, and drip sequences.
verify_fail:
I'm not an admin on that channel yet. Please follow these steps:
1. Open your channel → Edit → Administrators 2. Add @{bot_username} as admin 3. Send the channel @username here again
verify_fail_toast: ❌ Bot is not admin on that channel yet. Add it as admin, then try again.
verify_prompt: Great! Now verify the channel: Forward any message from your channel, or send the channel @username or invite link.
verify_success: Channel {title} added successfully! Subscribers must now join this channel before accessing your bot.
